legendNotes: Functional (1) brands are green, Lifestyle (2) brands are pink/pastel, and Social (3) brands are blue.

brands.visual_design_notes: clinical, straightforward packaging highlighting electrolytes.
brands.product_traits: Contains electrolytes and targets hydration.
brands.why_positioning_fit: Fits as a functional beverage targeting hydration needs directly.

brands.visual_design_notes: bold and sporty with focus on energy and BCAA benefits.
brands.product_traits: BCAA energy drink for sports and recovery.
brands.why_positioning_fit: Aims to support athletic performance with BCAA and energy nutrients.

brands.visual_design_notes: light blue packaging emphasizing its protein content and niche fusion of alcohol and protein.
brands.product_traits: Contains protein with a combination of alcohol for a unique drink.
brands.why_positioning_fit: Innovative approach combining protein with social drinking aspects.

brands.visual_design_notes: clean and clear labeling focusing on vitamin content.
brands.product_traits: Vitamin-enriched hydration for health and function.
brands.why_positioning_fit: Provides functional hydration through vitamin-enriched drinks.

brands.visual_design_notes: bright, playful packaging with a focus on probiotics.
brands.product_traits: Prebiotic drink with lively flavors and wellness focus.
brands.why_positioning_fit: Integrates prebiotic benefits with a fun lifestyle branding, appealing to health-conscious consumers.

brands.visual_design_notes: minimalist and elegant design focusing on natural ingredients.
brands.product_traits: Soft drink with a health and natural focus.
brands.why_positioning_fit: Encourages healthier everyday choices with a refreshingly natural taste.

brands.visual_design_notes: soft, friendly branding with health focus.
brands.product_traits: Prebiotic soda promoting gut health.
brands.why_positioning_fit: Targets wellness with a prebiotic-focused drink that fits lifestyle aspirations.

brands.visual_design_notes: vibrant, lively packaging with wellness appeal.
brands.product_traits: Gut health and wellness drink brand in prebiotic soda category.
brands.why_positioning_fit: Appeals to health-conscious consumers looking for a refreshing lifestyle beverage.

brands.visual_design_notes: fancy, trendy, experiential design aimed at mood enhancement.
brands.product_traits: Functional blend of mood-enhancing and social experiences.
brands.why_positioning_fit: Blends social appeal with mood-enhancing functionalities, ideal for gatherings.

brands.visual_design_notes: elegant labeling emphasizing its spirit-like presentation.
brands.product_traits: Alcohol-free spirits with a sophisticated look for social consumption.
brands.why_positioning_fit: Appeals to those seeking quality non-alcoholic options for social occasions.

brands.visual_design_notes: Modern, clean design with natural and botanical themes emphasizing wellness and artisan quality.
brands.product_traits: Live probiotics, organic teas and botanicals, unique and exotic flavors, softer carbonation, less acidic taste.
brands.why_positioning_fit: In: Clearly differentiated by smoother taste and functional, wellness-driven positioning within the kombucha lane.

brands.visual_design_notes: Minimalist design with pastel colors, playful branding, and clean typography emphasizing relaxation.
brands.product_traits: Infused with adaptogens and magnesium, real fruit flavors, non-caffeinated, positioned for stress relief.
brands.why_positioning_fit: In: Direct competitor in the infused sparkling water space targeting lifestyle-conscious consumers.

brands.visual_design_notes: Brand visuals emphasize natural, Appalachian-inspired motifs with clean and earthy design elements.
brands.product_traits: Naturally fermented, probiotic-rich, organic and wild-harvested ingredients, non-alcoholic, inspired by craft beer complexity.
brands.why_positioning_fit: In, as a prominent craft competitor focusing on natural kombucha and botanical sodas with a specialty and wellness positioning.

brands.visual_design_notes: Modern, clean design with bold, colorful labels emphasizing natural ingredients and flavor cues.
brands.product_traits: Organic ingredients, wild fermentation, no artificial additives, non-alcoholic, variety of flavors.
brands.why_positioning_fit: In, as it is a well-positioned kombucha brand with strong authenticity and health credentials.

brands.visual_design_notes: Minimalist Scandinavian, contemporary packaging with clean lines and bold typography.
brands.product_traits: Non-alcoholic, natural ingredients, mimics taste of traditional alcoholic drinks, ready-to-drink cocktails, wine alternatives.
brands.why_positioning_fit: In—strong category fit as a leading non-alcoholic mocktail and spirits brand positioned as a lifestyle upgrade.

brands.visual_design_notes: Colorful, modern can designs with clear flavor indicators and festive branding.
brands.product_traits: Made with real fruit juices and Blanco tequila, gluten-free, vegan, no artificial additives, available in cans.
brands.why_positioning_fit: Relevant for benchmarking both alcoholic and non-alcoholic tequila drinks targeting lifestyle-conscious consumers.

brands.visual_design_notes: Bright, vibrant can colors matching fruit flavors, modern design, health-forward imagery.
brands.product_traits: 10g plant-based fiber per can, sugar-free, uses monk fruit and stevia, vegan, lactose-free, gluten-free, multiple fruit flavors.
brands.why_positioning_fit: In scope for its direct competition in healthy, functional sodas targeting lifestyle upgrades.

brands.visual_design_notes: Clean, modern cans with bold color coding for each flavor and prominent protein content labeling.
brands.product_traits: 15g BLG protein per can, 9 essential amino acids, zero sugar, 66 kcal, lactose-free, carbonated lemonade flavors.
brands.why_positioning_fit: In because it directly fits the functional protein drink category with unique carbonated, lemonade-style flavors.

brands.visual_design_notes: Clean, modern branding with vivid fruit imagery and Scandinavian-inspired minimalist labels.
brands.product_traits: Fruit-forward flavors, made with spring water, variety of options including Strawberry-Lime and Wild Berries, sustainability focused.
brands.why_positioning_fit: In—well-established premium cider aligned with better social drinking occasions and fruit-forward profile.

brands.visual_design_notes: Features classic branding with sophisticated typography and a gold-crowned logo, emphasizing its premium positioning.
brands.product_traits: Carbonated, sweet-bitter, natural ginger flavor, available in cans and bottles, moderate calorie content.
brands.why_positioning_fit: In—well-known ginger ale in the Dutch and mixer markets, aligning with adult social drinking occasions.

brands.visual_design_notes: Elegant and modern packaging, often transparent bottles highlighting drink colors, with bold typography and cocktail-inspired imagery.
brands.product_traits: Zero sugar, non-alcoholic, cocktail-inspired flavors (Gin Tonic, Mojito, Ginger Mule), targeted at adult consumers.
brands.why_positioning_fit: Included for direct relevance to premium non-alcoholic mocktail competition with a strong presence in the Dutch and European markets.

brands.visual_design_notes: Packaging is modern and clean with vibrant colors to distinguish flavors; emphasizes high-quality, bar-inspired aesthetics.
brands.product_traits: Crafted with natural ingredients and high-quality spirits; offers both classic and innovative cocktail flavors in bottled and canned forms.
brands.why_positioning_fit: In: They define the standard for premium ready-to-drink cocktails, directly relevant to the RTD canned cocktails space.
